entries.content: Designed AgentChain protocol architecture: AgentRegistry for identity + staking, DelegationTracker for task lifecycle + fee distribution, AgentCapabilityEnforcer as MetaMask CaveatEnforcer, AgentChainArbiter as Alkahest IArbiter with 3-layer verification

entries.input: forge build — compiled 4 Solidity contracts (AgentRegistry, DelegationTracker, AgentCapabilityEnforcer, AgentChainArbiter)
forge test — 85 unit tests across 5 test suites
forge script Deploy.s.sol — deployed all contracts to Base Sepolia

entries.content: Designed 4 Uniswap specialist agents: LPAgent (orchestrator), SwapAgent (swap execution), PriceAgent (pool state reading), HooksAgent (V4 hook analysis). Each agent operates as an ERC-4337 HybridDeleGator smart account with its own ERC-8004 identity.

entries.input: Built @agentchain/sdk with modules: Registry, Tracker, Arbiter, Delegation, Accounts, Escrow, Reputation, Discovery, Olas Bridge, Relay, Events
entries.output: SDK compiles with 0 type errors. Supports both EOA mode and Smart Account mode (UserOperations via Pimlico bundler)

entries.input: forge test --match-test test_fullMainnetFlow -vv — integration test on Base mainnet fork
entries.output: PASS: Real EIP-712 delegation signed → DelegationManager.redeemDelegations() → AgentCapabilityEnforcer hooks fired → real Uniswap V3 swap (0.002 WETH → 4.30 USDC) → work records → 3-layer verification → fee distribution

entries.input: forge test --match-test test_fullMainnetFlowB -vv — multi-agent integration test
entries.output: PASS: Multi-agent delegation (PriceAgent + SwapAgent), delegation revocation detection, multi-agent fee distribution (20 + 80 + 200 USDC), ERC-8004 reputation rating

entries.content: Discovered Uniswap Trading API does not index Base Sepolia pools (token list empty). Designed API-first fallback strategy: always call Trading API first (logs API key usage), fall back to direct SwapRouter02 contract calls. Updated all agent SKILL.md files.

entries.output: Success — returns Permit2 approval calldata. Confirms API key is active and /check_approval works on Base Sepolia.

entries.input: Read WETH/USDC pool state on Base Sepolia via V3Factory + slot0 + liquidity
Created smart accounts via toMetaMaskSmartAccount() + Pimlico bundler for LPAgent and SwapAgent
Registered ERC-8004 identities for LPAgent and SwapAgent via UserOperations
Registered agents on AgentRegistry via batched UserOperations (approve USDC + registerAndStake in single UserOp)
entries.output: LPAgent: registered with 0.1 USDC stake (tx: 0xd0590a13...), SwapAgent: registered with 0.1 USDC stake (tx: 0x99b290fb...)

entries.content: Updated SDK to use @metamask/smart-accounts-kit. createAgentChainClient() now async, all write operations route through UserOps when smartAccountSalt is configured. sendWrite() and sendBatchWrite() handle routing automatically.

All on-chain state verified: 4 contracts deployed, 4 agents registered with ERC-8004 identities (LPAgent #2703, SwapAgent #2706, PriceAgent #2816, HooksAgent #2817), USDC staked, User SA funded and approved. 85 tests passing. SDK type-checks clean.

entries.input: EOA called registerTask() on DelegationTracker — posted user intent on-chain
entries.output: Task registered. Intent: 'Invest 0.01 ETH in the best Uniswap ETH/USDC LP pool'. Fee pool: 0.5 USDC. Tx: 0x2b484c3e2f4f4ddf02317828c26bc892df840f46773ff74c393e8da8e0763f45. Block: 39224018. TaskId: 0xadc54c875b24751559b063e70ad85b570274eac3c1566040b3e1d9217db79067

entries.content: LPAgent received task via HTTP. Decomposed intent: need pool analysis + swap + LP mint. PriceAgent and HooksAgent offline — LPAgent performed pool analysis directly. Queried all 3 WETH/USDC fee tiers. Selected 3000bp pool (0x46880b...) with deepest liquidity (1.396e13). ETH price ~$337 USDC, current tick 218253.

entries.input: LPAgent called /check_approval for USDC and WETH, called /lp/create_position
entries.output: /check_approval: success (logged API key usage). /lp/create_position: Forbidden (expected on Base Sepolia). API key activity registered on Uniswap servers.

entries.content: LPAgent delegated swap sub-task to SwapAgent via HTTP POST to localhost:3002/task. Intent: 'Swap 0.005 ETH to USDC on Base Sepolia, 3000bp pool, recipient = LPAgent'

entries.input: SwapAgent called /check_approval for WETH + /quote for 0.005 WETH → USDC on Base Sepolia
entries.output: /check_approval: approval needed for Permit2. /quote: 'No quotes available' (expected — Base Sepolia token list empty). Falling back to direct SwapRouter02.

entries.input: SwapAgent executed batched UserOperation: wrap ETH → approve WETH → exactInputSingle on SwapRouter02 (0x94cC...12bc4). 3000bp fee tier, recipient = LPAgent.
entries.output: UserOp: 0x0c3a239eedde1325cc88d8333a26ad583e47d9090fc47e35e471a17869c4edf0. Tx: 0x9d62c62ff828abaac6df9d45f04dc57d1782dc80a0a0203bc1e73f6c64c517aa. Status: Success. Input: 0.005 ETH. Output: USDC sent to LPAgent. LPAgent USDC balance after: 2.568606 USDC.

entries.input: LPAgent minted LP position via batched UserOperation (4 calls): wrap 0.005 ETH → approve WETH → approve USDC → NonfungiblePositionManager.mint(). Pool: WETH/USDC 3000bp. Tick range: 217260 → 219240 (±10% moderate strategy).
entries.output: UserOp: 0x066a6e69e1820eb96792e9d41433628d65463f7a2543475611f88ef282c4836f. Tx: 0x7f8943fa61c60e562005354e1a6470017fd1d71d9eab5dca9f1d25c7d55ed82f. Status: Success. LP position created with 2.568606 USDC + 0.005 WETH.

entries.input: LPAgent batched UserOp: claimTask() + submitWorkRecord(taskId, keccak256(lpTxHash), summary)
entries.output: Tx: 0xd636d9... Task status changed to Accepted. LPAgent is orchestrator. Work record submitted with LP mint tx as proof.
Tx: 0x9517cafa31893beffe0753af0f25764136a722db16b187a884bd7f5bf5f7daf2. Settlement complete. Fee pool (0.5 USDC) distributed to LPAgent. ERC-8004 reputation feedback submitted on-chain.

entries.content: Full on-chain lifecycle completed: registerTask → claimTask → Uniswap swap (SwapAgent) → LP mint (LPAgent) → submitWorkRecord → settleAndRate. All steps verified on Base Sepolia with real TxIDs.
